name: Greg's Egg Rolls
recipeIngredient: 1/2 lb Ground Beef and Pork mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all ingredients well.
2. Spoon the mixture into egg roll wrappers or wonton skins, following package directions.
3. Deep fry in enough peanut oil until golden brown, frying in batches if necessary.
4. I prefer using chunky peanut butter and smaller wonton skins for easier wrapping and faster cooking.
5. These rolls do not have a strong peanut butter flavor but taste similar to cashews, which are commonly used in oriental cooking.
